name: Galaxy S10+
notes:
1. Enable 'OEM Unlocking' in Settings > Developer Options before unlocking bootloader.
2. This device uses Heimdall (Odin protocol) instead of fastboot — EDL is not available on Exynos.
3. Bootloader unlock WILL wipe all user data — back up first.
4. Use Heimdall to flash recovery directly; reboot into recovery immediately after flashing.
5. The Exynos variant does not support EDL mode; hardware repair requires Samsung service tools.
